title: Touch 2: Intro Deck Generation
description: Walk through the complete Touch 2 intro deck workflow: strategy resolution, slide selection, and the full 3-gate HITL review with a skeleton refine demo.

steps.narration: Navigate to the Touch 2 Intro Deck page for the Meridian Dynamics deal. This is where you create a company introduction presentation tailored to your prospect.
The intro deck starts with strategy resolution. The AI analyzes your deal context to determine the best narrative arc and slide structure for this prospect.

callout.text: Deck strategy is resolved from deal context

steps.narration: After clicking generate, the AI builds the deck structure. It selects slides from your template library and arranges them based on the prospect's industry and engagement stage.
The skeleton gate shows the proposed deck structure. Review the slide order and purpose of each slide before the AI fills in the content.
Take a closer look at the proposed slide order. Each slide has a clear purpose tied to the sales narrative. You can request changes if the structure needs adjustment.
Let's try the refine feature at the skeleton gate. This is particularly powerful for intro decks because you can restructure the entire narrative before any content is generated.
The AI has refined the deck structure based on your feedback. Notice the updated slide titles, an additional Google Workspace slide, and a clearer narrative flow.
After approving the refined skeleton, the AI generates draft content for each slide. This is the lowfi gate -- review the slide previews with their content blocks.
Here you can see the content blocks for each slide. The AI has populated bullet points, statistics, and messaging that align with Meridian Dynamics' specific challenges.
Zoom in on one of the slide previews. The draft content is ready for your approval or refinement before the final polished version is generated.
After approving the draft content, the AI generates the final polished slides with full branding, corporate theme, and professional formatting.
The final deck looks polished with your corporate theme applied. Colors, fonts, and layout all follow your brand guidelines automatically.
Your intro deck is complete and saved to Google Slides. Click the link to open it directly or present it at your next meeting with Meridian Dynamics.
